ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" INTEGER /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the customer record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the customer record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the distributor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the distributor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the distributor */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the distributor record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the distributor record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the distributor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction status was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" INTEGER /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the payment record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the payment record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the payment record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the reminder */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder is due */,
  "reminder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., sent, pending) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reminder */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the reminder */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer, distributor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
